name: Peggy's Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 can Potatoes [Or use cooked, chopped potatoes to taste]
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon and save 3 tablespoons of the drippings.
2. Fry onion and celery in the drippings until tender.
3. Blend in flour, stirring until bubbly.
4. Remove from heat and stir in milk.
5. Heat to boiling point, stirring constantly.
6. Boil and stir for one minute.
7. Stir in remaining ingredients.
8. If desired, add a drained can of clams before serving.
